name: Celularity Inc.
description: Celularity Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing off-the-shelf, allogeneic cellular therapies derived from the postpartum human placenta. The company leverages its proprietary technology platform to develop placental-derived therapeutic candidates, including unmodified natural killer (NK) cells, genetically-modified NK cells, T-cells engineered with a chimeric antigen receptor (CAR), and mesenchymal-like adherent stromal cells (ASCs). These candidates target indications in cancer, infectious diseases, and degenerative diseases. Celularity also operates a commercial business selling biomaterial products for wound care and reconstructive applications.
